channel.title: Eternal Record
channel.description: Daily cinematic mythology stories — 90-second vertical videos.
channel.itunes:author: Ayush Rana

item.title: The Unyielding Envy of Krodhishva
item.description: Today's story will change how you see everything... In the kingdom of Anga, there lived a virtuous king named Krodhishva, known for his compassion and kindness. He ruled with fairness and wisdom, loved by his subjects and respected by his peers. But amidst this prosperity, a dark shadow crept into Krodhishva's heart - the envy of his neighbor, King Vrisha. Vrisha grew increasingly resentful of Krodhishva's power and the people's affection for him. He began to spread malicious rumors and lies about the king, fueling the flames of discontent among his own subjects. As the whispers grew louder, Krodhishva's kingdom started to crumble. His once-loyal subjects now turned against him, and even his own family members began to doubt his integrity. The king's advisors urged him to confront Vrisha, but Krodhishva, blinded by his own envy, refused to take action. The sin of envy devoured him, turning his kingdom into a battleground. 'A single glance of envy can destroy an entire kingdom.' Today, we see the dangers of comparing ourselves to others and the devastating consequences of letting envy consume us.
